task_completion.description: Open a bias frame FITS file from the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image analysis tool (e.g., AstroImageJ) is open, displaying a FITS image loaded from ~/AstroImages/ccd_characterization/.

task_completion.description: Measure the mean pixel value of a single bias frame.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A statistics or measurement window in the image analysis tool showing the 'Mean' pixel value of the loaded bias frame.

task_completion.description: Calculate the difference between two bias frames.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image calculator or math tool is used to subtract one bias frame from another, or a resulting difference image is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Measure the standard deviation of the difference image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A statistics or measurement window showing the 'StdDev' (standard deviation) of the newly created difference image.

task_completion.description: Save the calculated bias level, read noise, and standard deviation to the specified text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file ~/AstroImages/measurements/ccd_read_noise.txt containing 'bias_level_adu = <value>', 'read_noise_adu = <value>', and 'stddev_difference = <value>'.

integrity.description: The agent used an image analysis software (like AstroImageJ) to inspect and measure the FITS files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GUI of an image analysis tool being actively used to open and measure the FITS files, rather than just a terminal instantly outputting the answers.

integrity.description: The final values saved in the text file match the measurements observed in the image analysis tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values for mean and standard deviation typed into the text file should correspond to the numbers visible in the statistics windows of the image analysis software.

integrity.description: The agent derived the answers through calculation rather than hardcoding ground truth values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen performing the division by sqrt(2) (e.g., using a calculator or terminal) and extracting the raw values from the images before writing the final text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output file path: /home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/ccd_read_noise.txt. Ground truth values to look for: Bias Level is approximately 1131.08 ADU and Read Noise is approximately 5.75 e-/ADU. The standard deviation of the difference should be approximately 8.13 (since 5.75 * sqrt(2) ≈ 8.13).
